title: kubeadm init — What's next
text:
kubeadm init phase
to understand more about
kubeadm init
phases
kubeadm join
to bootstrap a Kubernetes
worker node and join it to the cluster
kubeadm upgrade
to upgrade a Kubernetes
cluster to a newer version
kubeadm reset
to revert any changes made
to this host by
kubeadm init
or
kubeadm join

Was this page helpful?
Thanks for the feedback. If you have a specific, answerable question about how to use Kubernetes, ask it on
Stack Overflow
.
Open an issue in the
GitHub Repository
if you want to
report a problem
or
suggest an improvement
.
